hero.subheadline: 58 Bars. 18 Days. 1 Ticket. Each bar creates an exclusive signature cocktail — only for the festival.

about.headline: GERMANY’S BIGGEST COCKTAIL FESTIVAL
about.description: 18 days, 58 bars, 1 ticket: Each participating bar creates an exclusive signature cocktail — only for the festival, for just €6.

howItWorks.headline: HOW IT WORKS

step1.title: GET YOUR TICKET
step1.description: Buy your ticket and get access to the app with all 58 participating bars and their festival cocktails. Your ticket accompanies you for 18 days through the festival.

step2.title: DISCOVER THE BARS & COCKTAILS
step2.description: In the app you can see which bars participate and which signature cocktail you can unlock there. Each bar creates a unique cocktail available only during the festival.

step3.title: SCAN & ORDER
step3.description: Scan the QR code at the bar with the app, unlock the signature cocktail and order it directly on-site for €6.

step4.title: COLLECT STAMPS & UNLOCK REWARDS
step4.description: For every signature cocktail you buy, you receive a digital stamp. The more stamps you collect, the more rewards and perks you unlock.

howItWorks.appHint: Everything in the Cocktail X App

faq.headline: FAQ
faq.q1: What is the Cocktail X Ticket?
faq.a1: The Ticket is your digital festival pass. It gives you 18 days of access to exclusive cocktails at all 58 bars across München, at special festival prices.
faq.q2: Is the ticket digital or physical?
faq.a2: The ticket is fully digital. After purchase, you get access via the Cocktail X App. No printing needed, just show it at the bar.
faq.a3: Each time you visit a participating bar, you receive a digital stamp in the app. The more bars you visit, the more prizes you can win.
faq.q4: Do I have to visit all bars?
faq.a4: No, you can visit as many or as few bars as you like. Each bar offers its own exclusive cocktails at the festival price.
faq.a5: Yes! The ticket makes a perfect gift for cocktail lovers. You can simply transfer it to another person after purchase.
faq.a6: Yes, the Cocktail X App is your companion during the festival. It holds your ticket, lists all participating bars, tracks your stamps, and offers exclusive content.
faq.a7: Cancellations are possible up to 14 days before the festival starts. Alternatively, you can transfer your ticket to another person at any time.
faq.q8: Do I need to make a reservation?
faq.a8: No, you can visit any bar spontaneously. The bars operate as usual and your signature cocktail is guaranteed to be available.
faq.a9: The festival is for guests aged 18 and over, as the festival program exclusively features alcoholic beverages.

t1.quote: I experienced my first Cocktail X Festival as a guest. Discovering new bars, getting to know exciting brands, and tasting extraordinary cocktails. All of it captivated me right away.
t1.name: Jennifer, 34

t2.quote: München, a sleeping giant, is being awakened by the Cocktail X Festival through its understanding of the essence and true meaning of bartending and hospitality.
t2.name: Simone, 42

t3.quote: A city's cocktail culture is defined by how it celebrates its own scene, and Cocktail X is München's bold statement to the world.
t3.name: Alex, 40

t4.quote: 18 days, 58 bars, and so many new favorite cocktails. This is how you do a cocktail festival.
t4.name: Thomas, 38

t5.quote: We went as a group and discovered a different bar every evening. Best summer in München!
t5.name: Lisa, 26

t6.quote: The signature cocktails were incredibly creative. You can tell the bartenders really put their hearts into it.
t6.name: Sarah, 29

t7.quote: For €20 you get access to 58 bars with signature cocktails for €6. Unbeatable value.
t7.name: Marco, 31

t8.quote: Perfect for date nights. A different bar and cocktail every evening. Couldn't be more romantic.
t8.name: Anna, 28

t9.quote: I thought I knew München's bar scene. The Cocktail X Festival proved me wrong.
t9.name: Felix, 35

t10.quote: My wife and I rediscovered München all over again. At our age, you think you know everything - but this festival proved us wrong.
t10.name: Gerhard, 81

t11.quote: Every evening is something completely new. Different bar, different atmosphere, different signature cocktail. It just never gets boring.
t11.name: Paula, 27

t12.quote: Five of us went out and drank our way through half of München. You meet so many people - it's just great fun.
t12.name: Luis, 24

t13.quote: I never would have thought München was this big when it comes to nightlife. The festival showed me corners I didn't even know existed.
t13.name: Dominik, 33

t14.quote: We traveled in from outside the city and made a family weekend out of it. Sightseeing by day, cocktails by night. Perfect!
t14.name: Theresa, 31

t15.quote: My goal: hit every bar and try every signature cocktail. I'm well on my way!
t15.name: Anton, 22
